description_long: This rifle features a striking, colorful design with a cosmic or graffiti-inspired pattern covering the main receiver, handguard, and grip. The stock is black with a pink accent, and the handguard and magazine are also predominantly black with scattered blue and pink highlights. The rifle has a detachable box magazine and a collapsible stock, making it suitable for urban tactical scenarios. The barrel is standard length and fitted with a small flash hider at the muzzle. The sighting system appears to be basic iron sights, and the overall build suggests a modern, lightweight tactical rifle. The combination of vibrant colors and practical features makes it visually distinctive and functional.
description: A modern tactical rifle with a vibrant, cosmic-patterned body, black collapsible stock, and detachable box magazine. Features a standard barrel, iron sights, and a flash hider.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, flash hider, and the narrow profile of the handguard and barrel.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full cosmic-patterned receiver, black collapsible stock, detachable box magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the end of the collapsible stock and the alignment of the receiver and barrel.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the same vibrant pattern, stock, magazine, and sight configuration as the left, with minor differences in visible controls.
